'''''[http://www.skyesports.in/ Skyesports]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.amd.com/en/ AMD]''''' present a multi title tournament called the '''Skyesports Mobile Open''' with a prize pool of ₹40,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. The BGMI leg of the tournament carries a prize pool of ₹25,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}

==About==

===Format===
'''''Skyesports Mobile Open:''' 19th December 2021 to 26th December 2021''.

* ''18 Qualified teams from the Semi-Finals.''
* ''42 Matches to be played over a period of 7 days.''
* ''Each day will feature a total of 6 matches. ''

====Finals Matchdays====
* ''8 Matchdays:  6 Matches Each Day.''
* ''E>>M>>S>>E>>M>>E''
